name: Physical & Environmental Risk
description: Risks arising from buildings, facilities, utilities, severe weather, and environmental events.

name: Business Continuity & Resilience
description: Risks affecting an organization's ability to continue critical operations and recover within tolerance.

name: Operational Process Risk
description: Risks from failed internal processes, human error, reconciliation problems, and workflow gaps.

name: Technology & Application Risk
description: Risks tied to software defects, failed deployments, architecture weaknesses, and application instability.

name: Cybersecurity Risk
description: Risks involving compromise, unauthorized access, malware, ransomware, or hostile cyber activity.

name: Information Security & Privacy Risk
description: Risks involving confidentiality, privacy compliance, data governance, and improper information handling.

name: External Fraud Risk
description: Fraud perpetrated by customers, outsiders, organized crime, or third parties.

name: Internal Fraud & Conduct Risk
description: Risks arising from employee misconduct, collusion, theft, or willful control evasion.

name: Third-Party & Vendor Risk
description: Risks tied to vendors, subcontractors, cloud providers, managed services, and vendor concentration.

name: Model, Analytics & AI Risk
description: Risks from flawed models, biased analytics, poor assumptions, drift, or unsupported AI outputs.

name: Payments & Network Rule Risk
description: Risks from ACH, cards, EFT, wire, network rules, settlement, and processing obligations.

name: Consumer Compliance Risk
description: Risks tied to consumer financial laws, disclosures, servicing obligations, and complaint handling.

name: BSA/AML, Sanctions & Financial Crimes Risk
description: Risks involving AML program weaknesses, OFAC screening, suspicious activity reporting, and customer due diligence.

name: Securities, FINRA & Public Company Risk
description: Risks linked to SEC, FINRA, disclosure controls, investor communications, and public company obligations.

name: Financial Reporting & Accounting Risk
description: Risks in accounting treatment, CECL, GAAP, FASB application, and reporting accuracy.

name: Credit & Counterparty Risk
description: Risks from counterparties, obligors, concentration, and product or settlement exposures.

name: Liquidity, Treasury & Funding Risk
description: Risks involving liquidity pressure, funding structure, brokered deposits, and treasury management.

name: Capital, Interest Rate & Market Risk
description: Risks related to capital adequacy, rate exposure, valuation swings, and market-sensitive positions.

name: Legal, Litigation & Judgement Risk
description: Risks from disputes, lawsuits, arbitration, judgments, and legal interpretations.

name: Strategic & Business Model Risk
description: Risks from failed strategies, product expansion, market shifts, or unsuitable business choices.

name: Reputation & Brand Risk
description: Risks involving trust erosion, public criticism, negative media, complaints, and franchise damage.

name: Human Capital & Workforce Risk
description: Risks tied to staffing, culture, training, key-person dependence, and workforce resilience.

name: Governance, Board & Oversight Risk
description: Risks from weak governance, unclear authority, poor committee oversight, and decision failures.

name: Audit, Assurance & Exam Risk
description: Risks involving internal audit, exam findings, unresolved issues, and weak testing coverage.

name: Records, Documentation & Retention Risk
description: Risks from incomplete records, bad documentation, retention failures, and evidentiary weaknesses.

name: Tax, IRS & Escheatment Risk
description: Risks involving tax reporting, withholding, retirement reporting, TIN issues, and escheatment.

name: Identity, Authentication & Access Risk
description: Risks from enrollment, authentication, access provisioning, MFA, and identity proofing failures.

name: Customer Fairness, Conduct & UDAAP Risk
description: Risks arising from unfair, deceptive, abusive, discriminatory, or poorly explained customer treatment.

name: Global, Cross-Border & Geopolitical Risk
description: Risks from international customers, sanctions zones, cross-border data movement, and geopolitical instability.

name: Insurance & Risk Transfer Risk
description: Risks that expected transfer mechanisms fail due to exclusions, gaps, underinsurance, or denial.
